title: centaurea boissieri var. saguntina
intro: Centaurea boissieri var. saguntina, also known as the Saguntine Knapweed, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Centaurea boissieri var. saguntina include teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use is not widely documented in modern medicine.
